title: Implement an integrated pest management program
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement an integrated pest management program demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Assess weed, pest and disease infestations

pcs.text: Determine operational parameters and objectives of the integrated pest management (IPM) program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine operational parameters and objectives of the integrated pest management (IPM) program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine operational parameters and objectives of the integrated pest management (IPM) program.

pcs.text: Identify symptoms of weed, pest and disease infestation in response to client needs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify symptoms of weed, pest and disease infestation in response to client needs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify symptoms of weed, pest and disease infestation in response to client needs.

pcs.text: Define weed, pest and disease relationships and vectors as key factors in plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define weed, pest and disease relationships and vectors as key factors in plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define weed, pest and disease relationships and vectors as key factors in plan.

pcs.text: Assess size and scope of infestation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess size and scope of infestation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess size and scope of infestation.

pcs.text: Assess business implications and urgency of action according to published data and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess business implications and urgency of action according to published data and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess business implications and urgency of action according to published data and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Report to management conditions likely to impact on business viability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report to management conditions likely to impact on business viability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report to management conditions likely to impact on business viability.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Assess weed, pest and disease infestations

elements.title: Plan appropriate integrated treatments for weeds, pests and diseases

pcs.text: Identify and confirm treatments selected include chemical or non-chemical products according to workplace procedures and IPM program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and confirm treatments selected include chemical or non-chemical products according to workplace procedures and IPM program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and confirm treatments selected include chemical or non-chemical products according to workplace procedures and IPM program.

pcs.text: Outline integrated application of treatments in planning documentation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Outline integrated application of treatments in planning documentation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Outline integrated application of treatments in planning documentation.

pcs.text: Identify and cost treatments that provide a suitable response to infestations, having regard to cost of damage, cost of infestation, marketing requirements, withholding periods and sustainable horticultural practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and cost treatments that provide a suitable response to infestations, having regard to cost of damage, cost of infestation, marketing requirements, withholding periods and sustainable horticultural practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and cost treatments that provide a suitable response to infestations, having regard to cost of damage, cost of infestation, marketing requirements, withholding periods and sustainable horticultural practices.

pcs.text: Determine if professional assistance is required and seek professional assistance where necessary’
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine if professional assistance is required and seek professional assistance where necessary’?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine if professional assistance is required and seek professional assistance where necessary’.

pcs.text: Document IPM plan according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document IPM plan according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document IPM plan according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Plan appropriate integrated treatments for weeds, pests and diseases

elements.title: Implement weed, pest and disease control measures

pcs.text: Confirm control procedures reflect sound implementation of integrated pest management strategy, marketing objectives and business imperatives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm control procedures reflect sound implementation of integrated pest management strategy, marketing objectives and business imperatives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm control procedures reflect sound implementation of integrated pest management strategy, marketing objectives and business imperatives.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and implement monitoring procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and implement monitoring procedures.

pcs.text: Communicate IPM plan and activities to staff, and supervise work according to the IPM plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate IPM plan and activities to staff, and supervise work according to the IPM plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate IPM plan and activities to staff, and supervise work according to the IPM plan.

pcs.text: Identify non-compliance with documented objectives, and implement remedial actions to alleviate or overcome identified shortcomings in plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify non-compliance with documented objectives, and implement remedial actions to alleviate or overcome identified shortcomings in plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify non-compliance with documented objectives, and implement remedial actions to alleviate or overcome identified shortcomings in plan.

pcs.text: Identify and record variances from IPM plan or monitoring procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record variances from IPM plan or monitoring procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record variances from IPM plan or monitoring procedures.
